input.prompt:
Search the codebase at /home/himmel/personal/prsui for documentation and demo files related to the "github-stars" component. Look for:
1. Any markdown/MDX files mentioning "github-stars" or "GitHubStars"
2. Any demo files or example files for github-stars
3. Check the registry directory structure to understand how docs/demos are organized for other components

Return the file paths and a summary of what each file contains.

result.output:
<task id="ses_0721898a0ffeUx5kw4KilWiT97" state="completed">
<task_result>
Here are the findings:

---

## Files Found Related to "github-stars"

### 1. Registry Component (shadcn-style distributable)

**`/home/himmel/personal/prsui/registry/new-york/github-stars.tsx`**

This is the distributable registry component. It is an **async server component** that fetches a GitHub repository's star count via the GitHub REST API (`https://api.github.com/repos/{repo}`), formats the count using `Intl.NumberFormat` with compact notation, and renders a button with the GitHub logo SVG, the formatted star count, and a `<Tooltip>` showing the full number. It supports `size` variants (`default`, `lg`, `sm`) via `class-variance-authority`, accepts a `repo` string prop (e.g. `"owner/repo"`), and has configurable `locales`.

---

### 2. Site-specific Component (internal use)

**`/home/himmel/personal/prsui/components/github-stars.tsx`**

This is a **client component** (`"use client"`) used internally by the prsui site itself (not the distributable registry component). It accepts a pre-fetched `stargazersCount` number, renders a ghost button linking to the prsui GitHub repo (via `LINK.GITHUB` and `UTM_PARAMS`), displays the star count in compact format, and shows the full count in a tooltip. It also plays a "success" sound effect via a `useFeedback` hook on click.

---

### 3. Wrapper Component

**`/home/himmel/personal/prsui/components/nav-item-github.tsx`**

An async server component that calls `getStargazerCount()` (from `@/lib/github`) and passes the result to the internal `<GitHubStars>` component. This is the navigation bar item that shows the project's live star count.

---

### 4. GitHub API Helper

**`/home/himmel/personal/prsui/lib/github.ts`**

Provides two cached functions: `getStargazers()` (fetches up to 500 individual stargazer profiles) and `getStargazerCount()` (fetches the repo's `stargazers_count`). Both use `unstable_cache` with a 24-hour revalidation. The repo is identified by `GITHUB.org` and `GITHUB.repo` constants.

---

## Files NOT Found (gaps in documentation/demos for github-stars)

### No MDX Documentation File

There is **no** `content/docs/components/github-stars.mdx` file. Every other registry component has a corresponding MDX doc file:

| Registry Component | MDX Doc |
|---|---|
| `accordion.tsx` | `content/docs/components/accordion.mdx` |
| `editable-chip.tsx` | `content/docs/components/editable-chip.mdx` |
| `inline-toast.tsx` | `content/docs/components/inline-toast.mdx` |
| `link.tsx` | `content/docs/components/link.mdx` |
| `logo-grid.tsx` | `content/docs/components/logo-grid.mdx` |
| `logo-marquee.tsx` | `content/docs/components/logo-marquee.mdx` |
| `split-action.tsx` | `content/docs/components/split-action.mdx` |
| `tooltip.tsx` | `content/docs/components/tooltip.mdx` |
| `typewriter.tsx` | `content/docs/components/typewriter.mdx` |
| `view-on-map.tsx` | `content/docs/components/view-on-map.mdx` |
| **`github-stars.tsx`** | **MISSING** |
| `smooth-input.tsx` | **MISSING** |

### No Demo File

There is **no** `demo/github-stars-demo.tsx` file. Every other registry component (except `smooth-input`) has a corresponding demo file in `/home/himmel/personal/prsui/demo/`, named `{component-name}-demo.tsx`.

---

## Registry Directory Structure Summary

The project follows a consistent three-part pattern for each distributable component:

```
registry/new-york/{component}.tsx    -- The actual component code (distributable)
content/docs/components/{component}.mdx -- MDX documentation with props table, usage, install commands
demo/{component}-demo.tsx            -- Interactive demo/preview imported by the MDX doc
```

The MDX files follow a standard structure:
1. YAML frontmatter with `title` and `description`
2. Import of the demo component from `@/demo/`
3. A `<ComponentPreview>` block wrapping the demo
4. Installation instructions with shadcn CLI commands (both short and full URL forms)
5. Usage code example
6. Props table

The `github-stars` component is missing both its MDX documentation file and its demo file compared to the established pattern. The `smooth-input` component is similarly missing both files.
</task_result>
</task>

<path>/home/himmel/personal/prsui/content/docs/components/tooltip.mdx</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: ---
2: title: Tooltip
3: description: Accessible animated tooltip with spring physics and portal rendering.
4: ---
5: 
6: import { TooltipPreview } from "@/demo/tooltip-demo";
7: 
8: <ComponentPreview name="tooltip">
9:   <TooltipPreview />
10: </ComponentPreview>
11: 
12: ## Installation
13: 
14: If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:
15: 
16: <CodeBlockCommand
17:   __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/tooltip"
18:   __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/tooltip"
19:   __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/tooltip"
20:   __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/tooltip"
21: />
22: 
23: Otherwise, use the full registry URL:
24: 
25: <CodeBlockCommand
26:   __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/tooltip.json"
27:   __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/tooltip.json"
28:   __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/tooltip.json"
29:   __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/tooltip.json"
30: />
31: 
32: ## Usage
33: 
34: After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:
35: 
36: ```tsx
37: import { Tooltip } from "@/components/ui/tooltip";
38: 
39: export function MyComponent() {
40:   return (
41:     <Tooltip content="Save changes" side="top">
42:       <button type="button">Save</button>
43:     </Tooltip>
44:   );
45: }
46: ```
47: 
48: ## Props
49: 
50: | Prop               | Type                                     | Default | Description                                              |
51: | ------------------ | ---------------------------------------- | ------- | -------------------------------------------------------- |
52: | `content`          | `ReactNode`                              | -       | Tooltip content                                          |
53: | `children`         | `ReactElement`                           | -       | Trigger element (must be a single valid React element)   |
54: | `side`             | `"top" \| "right" \| "bottom" \| "left"` | `"top"` | Preferred side for the tooltip to appear                 |
55: | `delay`            | `number`                                 | `120`   | Delay before showing in ms                               |
56: | `className`        | `string`                                 | -       | Classes applied to the tooltip popover                   |
57: | `wrapperClassName` | `string`                                 | -       | Classes for the outer wrapper span (use to fix baseline) |

(End of file - total 57 lines)
</content>

<path>/home/himmel/personal/prsui/content/docs/components/link.mdx</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: ---
2: title: Link
3: description: Animated link components with underline hover effects and customizable icons.
4: ---
5: 
6: import { LinkDemo } from "@/demo/link-demo";
7: 
8: <ComponentPreview name="link">
9:   <LinkDemo />
10: </ComponentPreview>
11: 
12: ## Installation
13: 
14: If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:
15: 
16: <CodeBlockCommand
17:   __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/link"
18:   __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/link"
19:   __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/link"
20:   __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/link"
21: />
22: 
23: Otherwise, use the full registry URL:
24: 
25: <CodeBlockCommand
26:   __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/link.json"
27:   __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/link.json"
28:   __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/link.json"
29:   __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/link.json"
30: />
31: 
32: ## Usage
33: 
34: After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:
35: 
36: ```tsx
37: import { Link01, Link02, Link03, Link04, Link05 } from "@/components/ui/link";
38: 
39: export function MyComponent() {
40:   return <Link01 href="https://example.com">Visit example</Link01>;
41: }
42: ```
43: 
44: ## Variants
45: 
46: | Variant  | Description                                                                  |
47: | -------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
48: | `Link01` | Underline animation from left to right on hover. External `<a>` tag.         |
49: | `Link02` | Underline animation from right to left on hover. External `<a>` tag.         |
50: | `Link03` | Underline animation from center outward on hover. External `<a>` tag.        |
51: | `Link04` | Full-width highlight with mix-blend-difference on hover. External `<a>` tag. |
52: | `Link05` | Left-to-right wipe with mix-blend-difference on hover. External `<a>` tag.   |
53: 
54: ## Props
55: 
56: All variants extend the native `<a>` attributes via the shared `LinkProps` type, plus two extras:
57: 
58: | Prop        | Type        | Default           | Description                                                                |
59: | ----------- | ----------- | ----------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
60: | `href`      | `string`    | -                 | The link URL (passed to the underlying `<a>`)                              |
61: | `children`  | `ReactNode` | -                 | Link content                                                               |
62: | `className` | `string`    | -                 | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root `<a>`                          |
63: | `icon`      | `ReactNode` | arrow SVG         | Custom icon node; replaces the default arrow (add your own hover classes)  |
64: | `target`    | `string`    | `_blank` (Link01) | All other native `<a>` props (`target`, `rel`, `onClick`, …) are forwarded |
65: 
66: ```tsx
67: import type { LinkProps } from "@/components/ui/link";
68: 
69: // Bring your own target / rel / onClick, etc.
70: <Link02
71:   href="https://example.com"
72:   target="_self"
73:   rel="nofollow"
74:   icon={<SomeIcon className="size-4" />}
75: >
76:   Visit example
77: </Link02>;
78: ```

(End of file - total 78 lines)
</content>

input.content:
---
title: GitHub Stars
description: Async server component that fetches and displays a GitHub repository's star count.
---

import { GitHubStarsDemo } from "@/demo/github-stars-demo";

<ComponentPreview name="github-stars">
  <GitHubStarsDemo />
</ComponentPreview>

## Installation

If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/github-stars"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/github-stars"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/github-stars"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/github-stars"
/>

Otherwise, use the full registry URL:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/github-stars.json"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/github-stars.json"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/github-stars.json"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/github-stars.json"
/>

## Usage

After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:

```tsx
import { GitHubStars } from "@/components/ui/github-stars";

export function MyComponent() {
  return <GitHubStars repo="vercel/next.js" />;
}
```

## Props

| Prop        | Type                 | Default  | Description                                      |
| ----------- | -------------------- | -------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| `repo`      | `string`             | -        | GitHub repository in `owner/repo` format         |
| `size`      | `"sm" \| "default" \| "lg"` | `"default"` | Button size variant                        |
| `className` | `string`             | -        | Additional CSS classes merged onto the button    |
| `locales`   | `Intl.LocalesArgument` | `"en-US"` | Locale for number formatting                  |

content.text:
Done. `pnpm fix` passes clean. Here's what changed:

**`registry/new-york/github-stars.tsx`** — redesigned with motion:
- Converted to client component with `motion/react`
- Star icon animates in with spring physics (rotate + scale + fade)
- Button has `whileHover` scale (1.03) and `whileTap` scale (0.97)
- Star count fades in with a subtle slide
- Better visual design: rounded-full pill with border, backdrop blur, and proper hover states
- Loading state shows `—` instead of `0`

**`demo/github-stars-demo.tsx`** — added `"use client"` directive

**`content/docs/components/github-stars.mdx`** — updated description
also update @registry.json
